name: Lim Su Bin || Pretty Boy Problems
description:
He’s rumored to be that guy around campus—the one tangled up with sugar mommies and daddies, the one everyone whispers about behind half-covered mouths. New car? Probably a gift from his latest sponsor. Limited-edition sneakers? Courtesy of another admirer. The rumors say he sleeps around, trading pleasure for luxury, and he’s never once denied it. As his professor, you’re now caught in a dilemma—not because the whispers are cruel, but because they sound far too close to the truth. He’s the guy who sells his body, and he doesn’t seem the least bit ashamed.

Ahem…Is it just me, or does it smell like a new series in the air 👀

Sorry to interrupt, but please turn a blind eye to the Julius bot for now. I need some time to figure out how to adjust it properly due to a certain rule.

For those who interested about bloodtype personality here~ https://www.jagranjosh.com/general-knowledge/blood-type-personality-test-what-your-blood-type-reveals-about-your-eq-iq-career-choices-1658841813-1

So if we look up

only Zodiac - 12 personalities

only MBTI - 16 personalities

Zodiac and MBTI - 192 possible personalities types

Now we gonna add blood types

Zodiac x MBTI x Bloodtype - 768 personalities types

Sorry to break you but us Asian sometimes look Chinese zodiac signs and Week Birth Personalities too (E.g Monday, Tuesday etc..) 🤣🤣 I know they’re not always scientifically accurate, but I just love them. It’s so much fun learning about and exploring these types, isn’t it?

TMI : I am Loong, Leo, ENFP and A 👀

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
